label: Infinite scroll sentinels
summary: Replaced the static ±3 month window with expandable monthsBefore/monthsAfter state, IntersectionObserver sentinels at the top and bottom, and scroll-position preservation when prepending months.
why: Phase 3 requires infinite scroll so users can browse beyond the initial date window without reloading.
impact: Scrolling near the calendar edges loads one additional month at a time while keeping the viewport stable when scrolling upward.

label: Selected card styling
summary: Added bg-primary/10 to the selected state so calendar cards match list view selection treatment.
why: Phase 3 calls for selected-card ring styling consistent with MissionListCard.
impact: The open mission card is visually highlighted on the calendar grid.

label: Calendar utils tests
summary: Added unit tests for day keys, droppable ids, window range, month iteration, week padding, grouping, and date helpers.
why: Phase 3 requires automated coverage for calendar-utils.
impact: Calendar date math and mission grouping regressions are caught in CI.

label: Due-datetime tests
summary: Added unit tests for parseDueDate, date input helpers, and buildDueDatetime time preservation and defaults.
why: Phase 3 requires automated coverage for due-datetime helpers shared by calendar DnD and the editor.
impact: Due date conversion behavior is verified when moving missions between days.

label: Register calendar tests
summary: Added calendar-utils.test.ts and due-datetime.test.ts to the yarn test script.
why: New test files must run with the existing webapp test suite.
impact: yarn test executes the calendar unit tests.

label: Calendar view documentation
summary: Added a Calendar view section covering card contents, drag-and-drop, undated behavior, infinite scroll, sticky headers, today highlight, and view persistence.
why: Phase 3 requires board UI docs to describe the new calendar surface.
impact: Product docs now document how the calendar view behaves alongside board and list.
